# sendToProvider

> Send an alert to a specific provider based on channel type

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| channel | AlertChannel | yes |
| alert | AlertEvent | yes |

## Steps

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[provider: condition]
  A --> B[result: return]
```

## Output

Type: `boolean`

## Error Handling

- **ProviderError**: log-and-return-false
